business_ideas.idea: Cofertility: free egg freezing bundled with egg donation, charges recipients $13-13.7k matchmaking fee.
Taking Care of Babies: sleep training course ($100-200) generating $10-15M annual revenue via Instagram funnel.
Big Little Feelings: parenting content to courses model, 200k courses sold at $100, $20M total revenue.
Good Inside by Dr. Becky Kennedy: psychology expert to community model, $300/year membership, 50k members, $13-14M revenue.
V-Shred: fitness quiz funnel selling $99 personalized plans, reported $200M+ revenue with 5M monthly visitors.
Mini Katana by Isaac: viral YouTube content (8.7M subs, 1B monthly views) driving sword e-commerce, $10-20M revenue.
Kanpai Foods: Isaac's freeze-dried candy brand pivot to larger TAM after sword business success.
Hampton: founder community membership ($300/year) with industry-specific wealth surveys, e-commerce reports.
Miss Excel: thought leader to Excel education courses to community model.
Mark Sisson: health/lifestyle thought leader to courses, community, and membership tiers.

predictions.text: Parenting/mom influencer niche will continue generating $10-20M+ annually via free-to-paid content funnels.
Opportunity selection (10/10 opportunity) matters more than execution quality; 10/10 execution on 2/10 opportunity fails.
Art of quitting mediocre middle-zone businesses is underrated; most focus on failing businesses or thriving ones.
